core_mechanism: a two-way coupled feedback dynamical system that is bistable, with a critical tipping threshold (saddle-node/fold bifurcation) separating two alternative stable equilibria, where heterogeneity in the coupled units shifts the equilibrium and can push the system across the threshold into the other basin of attraction
brief_reason: The abstract couples two mutually-driving subsystems and reports a tipping point at which conditions in one unit tip the whole system from one stable regime into an alternative high-state regime, the signature of bistability with a critical threshold.
